steps.title: Identify the comparison goal
steps.content: The question explicitly asks for a choice that accomplishes comparing the lengths of the two rivers. The key signal is the stated goal: “compare the lengths.”

steps.title: Find the choice that compares lengths
steps.content: Choice D states “The Madeira River is shorter than the Amur River,” which directly compares the two rivers' lengths using the numerical data from the notes. The other three choices either describe a single river or compare something other than length. That matches choice D — D is correct.
